response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, including MCP tooling and multi-language proficiency, but lacks direct evidence of building production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures. His background is more general AI-agent tooling than GenAI enterprise delivery. The resume also omits cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) and LLM optimization metrics, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript and Node.js
Recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven leadership in technical domains (e.g., workshops, open-source projects, team mentorship)
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI production systems
Limited evidence of cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) in the resume
Resumes lacks mention of LLM performance metrics, optimization techniques, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
